title: ResolveLocationInput
description: Input to the resolve_location tool. Converts a free-text place query into typed location identifiers.

query.description: Free-text place query, Korean or English (e.g., '서울 강남구', 'Jongno-gu Seoul', '강남역')

want.description: Which identifier(s) to resolve. Default 'coords_and_admcd' returns a ResolveBundle with both lat/lon and 10-digit 법정동 code.

near.description: [lat, lon] tiebreaker when the query is ambiguous (e.g., '강남' → 서울 강남구 vs 인천 남동구 강남동). Optional.
